Remove identifying detail (referents), not richness. Generic categories are allowed; anything that identifies a real entity is not.

Text stays serious and grammatically rich but never points at an identifiable real thing. A generic river is allowed; a named river is not. No proper nouns, no real named people, places, organizations, works, or brands, no numbers, dates, or quantities, no specific real facts.

The core content rule. The objective is a model with no referents to be wrong about, so hallucination of facts becomes impossible by construction rather than by guardrail. Stripping targets identifying specificity, preserving register, syntax, and conceptual richness. The severity parameter controls how aggressively categories themselves are generalized. This is a degree of knowledge absence, never an absolute guarantee.
